description_long: This community center complex features a central, modernist building with a distinctive angular roof and a prominent entrance plaza. The main structure is flanked by two additional buildings, one on each side, both with flat roofs and large windows, likely serving as auxiliary facilities or commercial spaces. The front of the complex is landscaped with symmetrical rows of trees, manicured hedges, and a series of decorative fountains leading up to the entrance. The paved plaza includes wide walkways, open gathering spaces, and a central fountain, creating a welcoming approach. The rear and sides of the property are bordered by dense greenery, providing a buffer from the surrounding urban environment. The overall layout is spacious and organized, emphasizing accessibility and community gathering.
description: A modern community center complex with a central angular-roofed building, flanked by two flat-roofed structures, landscaped gardens, and a prominent entrance plaza with fountains.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central fountain, landscaped gardens, and both side buildings clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the central building, the side structures, and the extensive greenery at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back gardens, the angular roof of the main building, and the symmetry of the landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side buildings, the central walkway, and the arrangement of trees and hedges.
attribute_signage: There is visible signage on the left and right side buildings, featuring large red and white text in a modern sans-serif font. The signage is mounted above the entrances and appears to serve identification and informational purposes.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located, wide, and features a prominent overhang integrated into the angular roof design. The approach is accessible via a broad, gently sloped walkway flanked by fountains and landscaping. The entrance appears to have large glass doors and is designed to be welcoming and accessible.
attribute_accessibility_features: Wide, gently sloped walkways leading to the main entrance suggest accessibility for wheelchairs and strollers. No ramps, elevators, or tactile paving are explicitly visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary modernist style, characterized by angular rooflines, extensive use of glass, flat-roofed auxiliary buildings, and minimal ornamentation. The landscaping and open plaza further emphasize a modern, community-focused design.
